reasoning: As of November 2025, the highest reported score on the FrontierMath benchmark is around 31% (achieved by GPT-5.2 Pro), and progress throughout the entirety of 2025 has been incremental—going from 25% (OpenAI o3 in December 2024) to roughly 31% by late 2025. With less than two months remaining in the year, and Epoch AI projecting that less than 70% of the benchmark is even "within reach" for today's models, an 80% score by the end of 2025 is effectively impossible. Furthermore, prediction markets estimate achievement of >85% only by 2027 or 2028. Therefore, the probability is extremely low.
batch_queries: Will an AI score over 80% on FrontierMath Benchmark in 2025
